title: systellantha serratifolia var. dolichophylla
intro: Systellantha serratifolia var. dolichophylla, also known as the long-leaved Systellantha, is a variety of plant that belongs to the family Rutaceae, commonly referred to as the citrus or rue family. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its medicinal properties which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Systellantha serratifolia var. dolichophylla is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or essential oil, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
